name_cn:
▪️ Mini Toy Shopping▪️
New Mini Tote Shopping Bag, small but surprisingly spacious! No extra compartments inside for personalized storage. Made from original factory plain calfskin, though plain calfskin is often thought to be stiff, this one is surprisingly soft, giving the bag a particularly high-end texture! No large logo, just a small and exquisite YSL charm and a row of brand engraved gold foil! Perfect for you who are low-key and sophisticated!
Model No.: 712367
Size: 18x17x8cm
